acceptance.metric: Presence and separate mesh no-coverage handling
acceptance.baseline: Missing player/mesh evidence could render nothing without an explicit state.
acceptance.after: Missing-evidence placeholders, labels, badges, and 0/N header gap count implemented.
acceptance.target: Explicit player and separate mesh coverage-gap presentation.

acceptance.baseline: All-implausible frames disabled the parent layer; suppressed poses had no fallback.
acceptance.after: Parent permits enabled implausible evidence; suppressed poses use the floor placeholder.

acceptance.baseline: Unbounded stale holds; normal always visible; crude estimated mesh.
acceptance.after: Full opacity through 0.083s, decay/drop by 0.25s; default-off normal toggle; amber beveled preview proxy.
acceptance.target: Bounded hold and honest proxy presentation.

acceptance.baseline: Prediction provenance collapsed and trails could cross segment boundaries.
acceptance.after: physics_predicted/low preserved, unbridged boundaries broken, hidden sentinels inserted, dead renderers removed, KPI source unified.
acceptance.target: Fail-closed four-state rendering without suppressed-span lines.

acceptance.baseline: Trust cards unmounted; missing mesh trust appeared solid; optional failures aborted load.
acceptance.after: Entity trust and capability badges mounted; missing trust becomes preview; optional loads isolated.
acceptance.target: Visible trust and non-fatal optional failures.

acceptance.baseline: Events defaulted off; transient count gated persistent markers; divergent nearest-sample rules.
acceptance.after: Events default on with empty reason; persistent layer mounts independently; shared PTS resolver and stale-age debug added.

acceptance.baseline: Two-entry chunk LRU with reactive loading only.
acceptance.after: Six-entry LRU with playback-direction adjacent prefetch.
acceptance.target: Cache increase and directional prefetch without performance claims.

changes: [App.tsx](/Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/web/replay/src/App.tsx:337): viewer truth UI, trust/load states, placeholders, paddle proxy, stale debug, chunk prefetch, and dead Ball removal.
[viewerData.ts](/Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/web/replay/src/viewerData.ts:515): canonical time resolver, presence state, and paddle decay.
[ballTrail.ts](/Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/web/replay/src/components/modules/ballTrail.ts:3): physics prediction bands and segment-gap sentinels.
[viewState.ts](/Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/web/replay/src/viewState.ts:24): skeleton, marker, paddle-normal, and resolved-ball gates.

[FINDINGS.md](/Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/runs/lanes/fixv_viewer_20260710/FINDINGS.md:1) and [report.json](/Users/arnavchokshi/Desktop/pickleball/runs/lanes/fixv_viewer_20260710/report.json:1): lane reports with per-item evidence and honest issues.

full_suite.command: cd web/replay && npx vitest run && npm run typecheck

honest_issues: No Vite server, browser, Playwright, screenshot, or device verification was run because socket-bound execution was forbidden. Visual layout is not browser-proven.
This presentation-truth work makes no FPS or accuracy improvement claim; VERIFIED=0 remains binding.
Required scaffold and dead-code audits passed. Storage policy still reports a pre-existing failure involving missing allowlisted artifacts/generated caches outside this lane.
Unrelated concurrent changes and the pre-existing untracked web/replay/public directory were preserved. Nothing was staged or committed.
BEST-STACK DELTA: none — no model or policy flip.
next: Manager can review and commit the scoped viewer diff, then run a permitted browser/device visual pass without treating it as an accuracy or performance promotion.
